_README: The real config lives at Jobs/.discord_webhooks.json locally and /var/www/pei-jobs/.discord_webhooks.json on the server (the persistent jobs volume, so it survives deploys and stays out of git). Create one webhook per channel in Discord: open the channel -> Edit Channel -> Integrations -> Webhooks -> New Webhook -> Copy Webhook URL. Leave a value as "" to keep that channel disabled in the Field Report tool. After editing, run upload_webhooks.bat to push it to the server.
